text.title: data-modeling Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for data-modeling as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Skipping the logical pass and writing physical DDL directly from screen mock-ups.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Produces tables that mirror UI layouts, embed presentation concerns, and break the moment a second feature reads the same data.

failure-mode.description: Using a JSON/JSONB column to store data with relational structure ("just put it in JSON for flexibility").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Defeats indexing, foreign keys, and constraints; performance and integrity collapse beyond ~100k rows.

failure-mode.description: Designing indexes after the application is in production.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
